reviews.review_description:
Zoomed in views cant be exited with Gear VR controller. Need to touch touchpad back.  (This works for me now. Oculus issue not thw app dev?)

Model building is easy, which I like.  If you want more detailed work painting and stickers can get very involved.

Are you supposed to be able to do things like open the hood?  Cause I cant.

Overall, an app Ill use to relax or demo VR. Glad I own it.  If it was $3 that'd be a great value.
Too close to the model can't even opened open  the book cause you're inside it. is there any way to move it out in front of you
Would be nice if we could take our model for a spin... :(
Some very small thing's to put my finger on. I want to zoom. Maybe use parts on other than where it shouldn.

I can't put my finger on what it's missing.... but let me try. 

There aren't that many parts per kit, and the Zen like relaxation of making the model is completely lost as the place each part goes highlights and you just select it. There are model instructions which are completely pointless as zero thought is required to place every single part. Instructions aren't needed. 

I think it just fundamentally fails at simulating the experience of using these model kits. Right now it's a click simulator game/model viewer. 

How to fix it? Off the top of my head... removing the highlighted area for each piece, giving the player freedom to rotate and place a piece anywhere they like and improving the readability of the instructions would go a long way towards making this into the app it's meant to be.

This game is fun and stunning. The 29 3D kits model is beautiful. 
Build it is a great experience. And it's allow you to paint and sticker it like a real plamo. My family really enjoy with this app. Love it.

Makes great use of the Gear VR motion controller and provides an experience that really benefits from being in VR. Building the models can be a nice relaxing activity and maybe even a starting point to learn more about the things you build.

You get all currently available 20 or so models for the price. They are fairly detailed but not nearly as much as the ones in the promo video that I'd from the Rift version.

Definitely recommend getting this if it seems like the kind of thing you would enjoy.
Its cool doesn't look  good as advertised

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We used Rift version for advertise. But we are still working on it and we want to bring more details for Gear VR.

reviews.review_description: If you added controller support to act as hands for this version it would be even better

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We would like to improve this feature going forward.

reviews.review_description: They sould add a demo so you know what your buying
Ive played this on a friends gear vr but dosnt want install on mine
Love this app. You can build all kinds of models, paint and apply decals. I love to build my model then look at it from all angles. This is a great way to unwind
